_meta.citation: 08-RESEARCH §2.4 #3: explicit baseline_label='0.050000' on a 0.04/0.05/0.06 grid. Verifies delta_vs_baseline_monthly==0 at the explicit-baseline row (index 1).

notes: Explicit baseline_label='0.050000' wins over the default-of-rates[0]; the baseline row's delta is exactly 0.00 (the row IS the baseline). Engine-emitted values captured via lib.stress.evaluate per D-05-01.
